verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I believe in Jesus: I believe He is the Son of God. I believe He died and rose again, I believe He paid for us all.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I believe He’s here now, I believe that He is here, Standing in our midst. Here with the power to heal now, With the power to heal, And the grace to forgive.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I believe in You, Lord; I believe You are the Son of God. I believe You died and rose again, I believe You paid for us all.
